positive: A stylized, minimalist portrait of a whimsical forest spirit emerging from abstract moss and glowing bioluminescent fungi. The spirit should have fluid, flowing lines, appearing almost like etched vapor or ink bleed, combined with natural, organic elements. Use a deep emerald, sapphire blue, and gold metallic color palette against a matte black background. Focus on creating strong negative space and clean silhouettes for central placement on clothing. High contrast, ethereal, detailed linework, vector-graphic quality, symmetry, trending on ArtStation.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, graffiti, cartoon, realistic photography, messy background, noisy
